property.name: quarkus.http.port
property.description: Plain HTTP listener port used by Polaris. This port is used only when insecure HTTP requests are enabled.

property.name: quarkus.http.ssl-port
property.description: HTTPS listener port used when TLS is enabled.

property.name: quarkus.http.insecure-requests
property.description: Controls handling of HTTP (non-TLS) requests. Allowed values: enabled (serve HTTP), redirect (HTTP 301/302 to HTTPS), disabled (reject HTTP). For non-TLS deployments set this to enabled.

property.name: quarkus.http.ssl.certificate.key-store-file
property.description: Absolute path to the server TLS keystore file (PKCS12/JKS). Required when TLS is enabled.

property.name: quarkus.http.ssl.certificate.key-store-file-type
property.description: Format of the TLS keystore file referenced by TLS Keystore File.

property.name: quarkus.http.ssl.certificate.key-store-key-alias
property.description: Alias of the private key entry in the keystore used for HTTPS.

property.name: quarkus.http.ssl.certificate.trust-store-file
property.description: Absolute path to the TLS truststore file used to validate client/peer certificates when configured.

property.name: quarkus.http.ssl.certificate.trust-store-file-type
property.description: Format of the TLS truststore file referenced by TLS Truststore File.

property.name: quarkus.log.console.enabled
property.description: If true, Polaris logs are emitted to stdout/stderr (useful for containerized deployments).

property.name: quarkus.log.file.enabled
property.description: If true, Polaris writes logs to file according to polaris-env log directory settings.

property.name: polaris.persistence.type
property.description: Metadata storage backend. Use relational-jdbc for production (PostgreSQL). in-memory is ephemeral and non-persistent.

property.name: quarkus.datasource.db-kind
property.description: Database engine type used by Quarkus datasource for Polaris metadata.

property.name: quarkus.datasource.jdbc.url
property.description: JDBC URL for Polaris metadata database. Example: jdbc:postgresql://host:5432/polaris_db

property.name: quarkus.datasource.jdbc.driver
property.description: Fully qualified JDBC driver class used for database connectivity.

property.name: quarkus.datasource.username
property.description: Database username used by Polaris for metadata persistence.

property.name: quarkus.datasource.password
property.description: Database password used by Polaris for metadata persistence.

property.name: quarkus.datasource.devservices.enabled
property.description: Enable Quarkus automatic local test database provisioning. Keep disabled in Ambari-managed environments.

property.name: polaris.authentication.type
property.description: Global authentication mode: internal (Polaris managed users), external (OIDC only), or mixed (both).

property.name: polaris.authentication.authenticator.type
property.description: Authenticator implementation identifier used by Polaris runtime.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-service.type
property.description: Token service implementation for internal authentication flows.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.type
property.description: Token signing strategy. rsa-key-pair uses asymmetric keys; symmetric-key uses one shared secret key.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.max-token-generation
property.description: Maximum generated token lifetime in ISO-8601 duration format (for example PT15M, PT1H, P1D).

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.rsa-key-pair.public-key-file
property.description: Path to RSA public key used to verify internally issued tokens.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.rsa-key-pair.private-key-file
property.description: Path to RSA private key used to sign internally issued tokens.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.symmetric-key.file
property.description: Path to shared key file used when token broker type is symmetric-key.

property.name: polaris.authentication.token-broker.symmetric-key.secret
property.description: Optional inline secret used for symmetric-key token broker mode.

property.name: polaris.realm-context.realms
property.description: Comma-separated list of allowed Polaris realms/tenants.

property.name: polaris.realm-context.header-name
property.description: HTTP header name used by Polaris to resolve the target realm.

property.name: polaris.realm-context.require-header
property.description: If true, requests must include the configured realm header.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.tenant-enabled
property.description: Enable Quarkus default OIDC tenant. Must be true when Polaris authentication.type is external or mixed.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.auth-server-url
property.description: OIDC issuer URL (realm endpoint), for example https://keycloak.example/realms/polaris.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.client-id
property.description: OIDC client identifier registered for Polaris at the IdP.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.credentials.secret
property.description: OIDC client secret associated with OIDC Client ID.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.application-type
property.description: Quarkus OIDC application type. service validates bearer tokens; web-app enables browser login flows.

property.name: quarkus.oidc.roles.role-claim-path
property.description: Claim path inside JWT token where role names are read (for example realm_access/roles).

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-mapper.type
property.description: Principal mapping strategy implementation used by Polaris OIDC integration.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-mapper.id-claim-path
property.description: JWT claim path used to derive stable Polaris principal identifier.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-mapper.name-claim-path
property.description: JWT claim path used to derive display name for Polaris principal.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.type
property.description: Role mapping strategy implementation used by Polaris OIDC integration.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.filter
property.description: Regex filter applied to incoming token roles before mapping to Polaris roles.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.mappings[0].regex
property.description: Regex pattern applied to each role that passes the filter.

property.name: polaris.oidc.principal-roles-mapper.mappings[0].replacement
property.description: Replacement expression used to build mapped Polaris role names from matched roles.
